g.text: Operator fills the form and clicks\n"Create Staff Member"
Ensures short name , email and phoneNumber \nare provided and not empty
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM StaffMembers WHERE Email = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM StaffMembers WHERE PhoneNumber = ?
Validates that all provided qualification names\nexist in the system and returns their IDs
SELECT * FROM Qualifications WHERE DescriptiveName IN (names)
Creates domain entity with validated\nfields and qualification IDs
Displays success message\nand redirects to staff detail page
